de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.po

Class TruthValuePOExtension

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.po.TruthValuePOExtension
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    POExtension

    public class TruthValuePOExtension
extends Object
implements POExtension
    Implementation of POExtension to support truth value evaluation.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Method Detail

      • isPOSupported

        public boolean isPOSupported(ProofOblInput po)
        Checks if the given ProofOblInput is supported.
        Specified by:
        isPOSupported in interface POExtension
        Parameters:
        po - The ProofOblInput to check.
        Returns:
        true is supported, false is not supported.

      • modifyPostTerm

        public Term modifyPostTerm(InitConfig proofConfig,
                  Services services,
                  Term postTerm)
        Modifies the post condition.
        Specified by:
        modifyPostTerm in interface POExtension
        Parameters:
        proofConfig - The InitConfig to use.
        services - The Services to use.
        postTerm - The post condition to modify.
        Returns:
        The modified post condition or the original post condition if no modifications were performed.

      • labelPostTerm

        protected Term labelPostTerm(Services services,
                 Term term)
        Labels all predicates in the given Term and its children with a FormulaTermLabel.
        Parameters:
        services - The Services to use.
        term - The Term to label.
        Returns:
        The labeled Term.
